understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level to achieve a WIN condition and complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece in a direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks if space allows; walls and obstacles block or interact variably based on discovery through actions; selection switches between multiple selectable pieces (P or S) using CLICK with precise pixel/grid coordinates like [x, y], enabling control of different pieces to cover all goals.
